name: Coconut Chicken Curry
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken breasts, boned & cut into 1-inch dice
4 medium Potatoes, peeled & cut into 1-inch dice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large casserole, sauté onion in oil until softened.
2. Add green pepper and garlic, and sauté for 2 minutes.
3. Add curry powder and sauté for 1 minute.
4. Add chicken, potatoes, coconut milk, salt to taste, and enough stock or water to cover the ingredients.
5. Bring mixture to a boil, then cover and simmer for 30 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
